items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade
🇫🇷AS5293CHANEL 25 Another year-named model, 25c ball-grain leather hip-hop bag. Chanel hobo shoulder bag, boho shoulder bag, small size, vintage gold coin button drawstring bucket bag + quilted + vintage black and gold. Classic chain design, full of high-end feel! Essential for daily outings. Beautiful appearance, delicate texture, easily handles both casual and formal occasions. Dimensions: 30x26x14cm

items.name_en: [Highest version original factory leather top-tier original set with full counter packaging] 25c Kelly Lamb Skin
items.name_cn:
[Highest version original factory leather top-tier original set with full counter packaging] 25c Kelly Lamb Skin
Fashion is a cycle, the big hot vintage Kelly is re-designed by Chanel to bring it back to life. Vintage Kelly is famous for its classic handle handbag, adding a leather chain shoulder strap to the base to subvert tradition, making it more casual and convenient
Model: AS4416
Size: 13-19-7
Full set packaging

items.name_en: Genuine leather, in stock 25A Suede bag|
items.name_cn:
Genuine leather, in stock 25A Suede bag|
New arrival of the 25A series, this suede and leather patch bag is a god-tier design! High-quality suede meets smooth calfskin, texture is maxed out. Quilted pattern + classic double C logo, low-key luxury!!️ Suede × glossy leather, the layering is amazing! Distressed gold chain is adjustable, shoulder/ crossbody/clutch in one bag! Fits phone + lipstick + compact, practical and structured! Versatile and suits everyone! size: 35*24*12cm

items.name_cn:
Chan1✔️Vintage original pre-owned CF Black Lamb Skin
The CF Chanel grandma's heirloom is here! The most classic vintage CF black lamb skin with quilted pattern + gold metal, timeless classic flap
Rich vintage vibe~ really heart-fluttering. Twist lock closure with sliding chain, switch between shoulder and crossbody easily. Perfect size, super versatile for daily wear
Size: 26cm

items.name_en: New: Pre-owned model zp edition
items.name_cn:
New: Pre-owned model zp edition
Chan1 Large Crossbody Bag Retro chain decoration makes the whole bag unique, full of artistic atmosphere. The flap design highlights a casual style, not too restrictive, letting you show your most natural state anytime, anywhere. The quality is reliable, no need to worry about defects. Made of premium materials, ensuring durability and longevity. Internal details are also exquisite, effectively protecting your items, giving you peace of mind when going out. In summary, this exclusive vintage pre-owned shoulder bag is the perfect choice for casual elegance! It not only boosts your fashion index but also shows your personality and taste. Whether at any time or place, it makes you radiate charm and become the focus of attention. Get it now, let yourself exude charm every day.
Code: 3329
Size: 34cm

items.name_en: New Chanel 25 Bag|||The rising "Chanel 25bag" is another "It Bag" following the Chanel 22bag! The design is classic and practical, continuing the brand's three signature elements: quilted lambskin, chain strap, and double-C turn-lock, but the drawstring design looks more casual![Selfie][Blow Kiss]
items.name_cn:
New Chanel 25 Bag|||The rising "Chanel 25bag" is another "It Bag" following the Chanel 22bag! The design is classic and practical, continuing the brand's three signature elements: quilted lambskin, chain strap, and double-C turn-lock, but the drawstring design looks more casual![Selfie][Blow Kiss]
Carrying Styles & Comfort:
The chain strap is adjustable in length, supporting shoulder, crossbody, and hand-carry styles, suitable for commuting, dates, and casual occasions;
A separate leather lining enhances support, making it comfortable to carry for long periods.
Fits a phone, small wallet, and keys Light travel, evening wear
The Chanel 25 Bag has a "just right" golden size, balancing capacity, portability, and daily adaptability, widely regarded as the most handy choice.
Dimensions 30x26x14
